reasoning: The primary limiter for you, Koren, is the 25W drop-off in power from 5-min to 20-min efforts, indicating poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance. In your last ride, you averaged 159.7W on a moderate effort, but to tackle the key segments of the Alpine Loop effectively, we need to focus on stabilizing power over longer durations. This ride will simulate the demands and fluctuations of the Alpine Loop by targeting power levels that improve your lactate threshold.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Over-unders structured as 3x15 minutes: 3 minutes at 242-256W, followed by 3 minutes at 201-218W, repeat.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
